name: Croesus Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped black walnuts or pecans
recipeInstructions:
Cream butter with the 2/3 cup brown sugar and 1/2 cup granulated sugar in a large bowl using an electric mixer. Beat egg yolks lightly, then add them to the mixture. Add water and flavorings.
Sift flour with baking soda and salt, blending well into the mixture. Spread evenly in an ungreased 15x10x1-inch jelly-roll pan. Sprinkle chocolate bits and walnuts on top; press down lightly using the palm of your hand.
Beat egg whites until foamy; add cream of tartar and continue beating until stiff peaks form. Gently fold in half cup brown sugar. Spread over chocolate bits.
Bake at 300°F for 50 to 55 minutes. Cool, then cut into squares. Serve as small cookies or larger bars for an ice cream dessert base. Freezes well. Yield: 60 small cookies.
